title: Immunofluorescence and confocal microscopy
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"1sve0","text":"This protocol details the process of immunofluorescence and confocal microscopy.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"14r2g","text":"28906, Thermo Fisher Scientific  ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":31,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"172c9","text":"0.1% (v/v) Triton X-100 (9002-93-1, Sigma-Aldrich)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dihgg","text":"5% (v/v) BSA (9048-46-8, Sigma-Aldrich)  ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":1,"offset":39,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"7kjlj","text":"DAPI Fluoromount-G mounting medium (0100-20, Southern Biotech)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"reagents","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"id":916645,"guid":"426CF5C1341F11EE9D4302C0B41BC903","name":"Pierce™ 16% Formaldehyde (w/v) Methanol-free","mol_weight":0,"sku":"28906","url":"https://www.thermofisher.com/order/catalog/product/28906#/28906","cas_number":"","rrid":"","vendor":{"id":95,"name":"Thermo Fisher Scientific","link":"https://www.thermofisher.com/us/en/home.html","is_requested":false,"image":{"source":"/img/vendors/placeholder.png","placeholder":"/img/vendors/placeholder.png"}},"is_public":true,"can_edit":false}},"1":{"type":"reagents","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"id":956862,"guid":"43738868341F11EE9D4302C0B41BC903","name":"Bovine Serum Albumin [BSA]","mol_weight":0,"sku":"9048-46-8","url":"","cas_number":"","rrid":"","vendor":{"id":31,"name":"Fisher Scientific","link":"https://www.fishersci.com/us/en/home.html","is_requested":false,"image":{"source":"/img/vendors/placeholder.png","placeholder":"/img/vendors/placeholder.png"}},"is_public":true,"can_edit":false}}}}
steps: Seed the cells on glass coverslips (12 mm #1.5) at a concentration of 100.000 cells/well, and after treatment with Rapalog for the indicated time, fix in 4% paraformaldehyde (28906, Thermo Fisher Scientific) for 00:10:00 at Room temperature .
After washing with PBS, permeabilize the cells with 0.1% (v/v) Triton X-100 (9002-93-1, Sigma-Aldrich) in PBS for 00:05:00 .
Perform the blocking with blocking buffer (5% (v/v) BSA (9048-46-8, Sigma-Aldrich) and 0.05% (v/v) Triton X-100 diluted in PBS) for 01:00:00 at Room temperature .
Dilute the primary and secondary antibodies in blocking buffer and incubate for 01:00:00 at Room temperature with three PBS washing steps in between.
Mount the cells on microscopy slides in DAPI Fluoromount-G mounting medium (0100-20, Southern Biotech), which stains the nuclei, and store at 4 °C until use.
Perform the confocal microscopy with a Zeiss LSM700 laser scanning confocal microscopy with Plan-Apochromat 40×/1.30 Oil DIC, WD 0.21 mm objective.
creator: Elias Adriaenssens
